title: Welcome to the PickMyBinge Lab
excerpt: Discover how we use AI to find you the perfect movie without the endless scroll.
content:
Welcome to PickMyBinge — where we cut through the noise so you can get straight to watching.

We built this platform because endless scrolling is a real problem. The average viewer spends 18 minutes just picking something to watch. That's 18 minutes you could spend actually watching.

What We Do

Our AI-powered engine cross-references mood, genre, and your tolerance for bad CGI to surface exactly what you should watch tonight. No algorithms trained to maximize your screen time — just honest recommendations.

The Blog

Every day we publish a new deep-dive: hidden gems, genre breakdowns, and honest takes on what's actually worth your time on Netflix, Prime, and beyond.

Stop scrolling. Start watching. That's the whole pitch.

Stick around — it's going to be a good watch.
